section_miscategorizations.text: The doctor orders a repeat hemoglobin A1c to monitor diabetes control. The doctor refills the metformin prescription.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These are appropriate plan items, but they are unrelated to the knee injury that is the sole focus of the HPI, Findings, and Assessment. Their sudden appearance without any mention of diabetes or glycemic status in HPI/Findings/Assessment creates organizational inconsistency and could confuse the reader about the scope of the encounter, though they are still technically plan actions.
